symptoms.symptom_name: Multiple chronic verrucous papules with disrupted skin lines/black dots; one torn/bleeding

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Rough verrucous papules with disrupted skin lines and black dots are diagnostic of viral warts.
Molluscum is smooth, pearly and umbilicated, not rough verrucous.

symptoms.symptom_name: Multiple, long-standing (not a solitary rapidly-growing friable nodule)

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Multiplicity and chronicity argue against a solitary rapidly-growing pyogenic granuloma.

investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Warts are clinical; biopsy only a solitary atypical/changing lesion.
